enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day working as a house cleaner in Boulder, then shares his system for listening to Librivox audiobooks of 'The Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire' — 298 chapters organized on his phone, browsable via his personal website. He also mentions recording new videos on autism and a viewer request topic, and muses about monetizing his website with ads.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited and nostalgic about having a fan base again
finds it valuable — repeated listening builds layered understanding
thinks he should add ads since traffic may be picking up
enthusiastic about the idea of sending people hard drives filled with his organized audiobook collection

entities: The Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire
